intended_use: NeuroICH is a notification-only, parallel workflow tool for use by hospital networks and trained clinicians to identify and communicate images of suspected ICH patients to a specialist, independent of
intended_use_full: NeuroICH is a notification-only, parallel workflow tool for use by hospital networks and trained clinicians to identify and communicate images of suspected ICH patients to a specialist, independent of standard of care workflow. The device uses an artificial intelligence algorithm to analyze non-contrast CT images of the head acquired in the acute setting for findings suggestive of intracranial hemorrhage (ICH) in parallel to the ongoing standard of care image interpretation and notify an appropriate clinician of these findings.
target_condition: Intracranial hemorrhage (ICH) including subtypes: extradural, subdural, subarachnoid, intraparenchymal, and intraventricular hemorrhages
ground_truth: Three US board-certified neurologists establishing consensus reference standard for ICH presence/absence
other_metrics: Time-to-Notification (TTN): 0.37 ± 0.20 minutes; performance stratified by age group, gender, slice thickness, ICH sub-type, scanner manufacturer, scanner model, and reconstruction method
